scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix ui ci && npm --prefix lambdas ci && npm --prefix tests ci
scripts.test: npm --prefix ui run test && npm --prefix lambdas run test
scripts.test:playwright: UI_BASE_URL=$(terraform -chdir=local-environment/infra output -raw ui_url) API_BASE_URL=$(terraform -chdir=local-environment/infra output -raw api_base_url) npm --prefix tests run test:chrome
scripts.format: (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -z; git diff --name-only --cached --diff-filter=ACMR -z) | sort -zu | xargs -0 sh -c '[ "$#" -gt 0 ] && npm run format:pre-commit -- "$@"' sh
scripts.lint: npm --prefix ui run lint && npm --prefix lambdas run lint && npm --prefix tests run lint
scripts.local:start: npm run local:backend:start && npm run local:terraform:init && npm run local:deploy && npm run local:frontend:up
scripts.local:stop: npm run local:terraform:destroy && COMPOSE_PROFILES=* npm run local:compose:down
scripts.local:restart: npm run local:stop && npm run local:start
scripts.local:deploy: NODE_ENV=development npm run build:lambdas && npm run package:lambdas && npm run local:terraform:apply
scripts.local:backend:start: COMPOSE_PROFILES=backend npm run local:compose:up && npm run local:service:db:migrate
scripts.local:frontend:start: npm run local:terraform:env && npm run local:frontend:up
scripts.local:service:db:migrate: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up --build db-migrate
scripts.local:terraform:apply: bash local-environment/scripts/localstack/ensure-localstack-running.sh && npm run local:terraform -- apply -auto-approve && npm run local:terraform:env
scripts.local:service:lambda:disable: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test aws lambda put-function-concurrency --function-name hometest-service-$LAMBDA --reserved-concurrent-executions 0 --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region eu-west-2
scripts.local:service:lambda:enable: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test aws lambda delete-function-concurrency --function-name hometest-service-$LAMBDA --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region eu-west-2
